narrative:
Pittsfield Township has 1,124 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a clear Republican lean of 7.7 percentage points.
